home.subtitle: Your knitting/crochet assistant
home.description: Malaine helps you create, customize, and complete your knitting and crochet projects with the help of AI.

adapt_patterns.title: Adapt Patterns
adapt_patterns.description: Customize existing patterns to your desired measurements and yarn type.

interactive_editor.title: Interactive Editor
interactive_editor.description: Modify patterns with our visual editor and see changes in real-time.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: Get help with techniques, calculations, and troubleshooting from our smart assistant.

measurements.title: Body Measurements
measurements.subtitle: Manage your body measurements for pattern sizing
measurements.no_sets_description: You haven't created any measurement sets yet. Create your first set to get started.
measurements.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.description_create: Enter your body measurements to create a new set
form.notes_placeholder: Add any additional notes about these measurements...
form.custom_value_error: Custom measurement value must be a positive number

fields.chest_circumference_description: Measure around the fullest part of the chest/bust
fields.hip_circumference_description: Measure around the fullest part of the hips
fields.shoulder_width_description: Measure from shoulder point to shoulder point
fields.torso_length_description: Measure from nape of neck to waist
fields.head_circumference_description: Measure around the largest part of the head
fields.neck_circumference_description: Measure around the base of the neck
fields.foot_length_description: Measure from heel to longest toe

guide.tip_2: Keep the tape snug but not tight
guide.tip_3: Stand in a natural, relaxed position
guide.tip_4: Take measurements over fitted clothing or undergarments

note.placeholder: Add a note about this measurement...

gauge.title: Gauge Profiles
gauge.subtitle: Manage your knitting and crochet gauge measurements
gauge.no_profiles: No gauge profiles found. Create your first one!

form.notes_placeholder: Optional notes about yarn, needles, or technique...

validation.profile_name_too_long: Profile name must be 255 characters or less
validation.stitch_count_positive: Stitch count must be a positive number
validation.stitch_count_max: Stitch count must be less than 1000
validation.row_count_positive: Row count must be a positive number
validation.row_count_max: Row count must be less than 1000
validation.swatch_width_positive: Swatch width must be a positive number
validation.swatch_width_max: Swatch width must be less than 1000
validation.swatch_height_positive: Swatch height must be a positive number
validation.swatch_height_max: Swatch height must be less than 1000
validation.notes_too_long: Notes must be 1000 characters or less

messages.name_exists: A gauge profile with this name already exists
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this gauge profile?

info.gauge_explanation: Gauge is the number of stitches and rows per unit of measurement (usually 10cm or 4 inches). It's crucial for ensuring your finished project matches the intended size.
measure_steps: Knit or crochet a swatch using your chosen yarn and tools
Block the swatch as you would the finished project
Measure and count stitches and rows within a 10cm × 10cm (4in × 4in) square
Record the measurements in your gauge profile

ease.title: Ease Preferences
ease.subtitle: Manage your garment fit preferences and ease values
ease.no_preferences: No ease preferences found. Create your first one!
ease.create_description: Define your preferred ease values for different garment areas

form.preference_name_placeholder: e.g., Classic Sweater Fit, Tight Tank Top
form.categories_description: Choose a predefined category to quickly set up your ease values, then customize as needed.
form.notes_placeholder: Optional notes about this ease preference...

validation.preference_name_too_long: Preference name must be 255 characters or less
validation.measurement_unit_required: Measurement unit is required for absolute ease
validation.bust_ease_number: Bust ease must be a valid number
validation.waist_ease_number: Waist ease must be a valid number
validation.hip_ease_number: Hip ease must be a valid number
validation.sleeve_ease_number: Sleeve ease must be a valid number
validation.bust_ease_range: Bust ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.waist_ease_range: Waist ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.hip_ease_range: Hip ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.sleeve_ease_range: Sleeve ease must be between -50 and 100
validation.notes_too_long: Notes must be 1000 characters or less

messages.name_exists: An ease preference with this name already exists
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this ease preference?

info.ease_explanation: Ease is the difference between your body measurements and the finished garment measurements. It determines how the garment will fit.
info.negative_ease_desc: Negative ease: Garment is smaller than body measurements (tight fit)
info.zero_ease_desc: Zero ease: Garment matches body measurements exactly
info.positive_ease_desc: Positive ease: Garment is larger than body measurements (loose fit)

yarn.subtitle: Manage your yarn and material profiles
yarn.no_profiles_description: You haven't created any yarn profiles yet. Create your first profile to get started.

form.description_create: Record your yarn details for quantity estimation and project tracking

validation.yarn_name_too_long: Yarn name must be 255 characters or less
validation.brand_name_too_long: Brand name must be 255 characters or less
validation.skein_weight_positive: Skein weight must be a positive number
validation.skein_yardage_positive: Skein yardage must be a positive number
validation.skein_meterage_positive: Skein meterage must be a positive number
validation.color_hex_format: Color code must be in #RRGGBB format

validation.purchase_link_url: Purchase link must be a valid URL

stitchPattern.title: Stitch Patterns
stitchPattern.subtitle: Choose your stitch pattern
stitchPattern.description: Choose from our collection of basic stitch patterns for your knitting or crochet projects. Each pattern includes information about stitch repeats and characteristics that will help with your gauge calculations.
stitchPattern.gaugeReminder: Remember to measure your gauge in the selected stitch pattern
stitchPattern.gaugeNotice: Your gauge (number of stitches and rows per inch/cm) can vary significantly between different stitch patterns. Always create a gauge swatch in your chosen stitch pattern before starting your project.
stitchPattern.step1: Create a gauge swatch in this stitch pattern
stitchPattern.step3: Use this information for pattern calculations
stitchPattern.noSearchResults: No stitch patterns found matching your search

reverse_gauge_calculator.title: Reverse Gauge Calculator
reverse_gauge_calculator.description: Calculate required stitches/rows for target dimensions, resulting dimensions from stitch counts, or compare pattern gauge vs user gauge

target_to_stitches.title: Target Dimension → Stitches/Rows
target_to_stitches.description: Calculate how many stitches or rows you need for a specific dimension with your gauge

stitches_to_dimension.title: Stitches/Rows → Dimension
stitches_to_dimension.description: Calculate the resulting dimension when using a specific number of stitches or rows with your gauge

gauge_comparison.title: Pattern vs User Gauge Comparison
gauge_comparison.description: Compare pattern gauge with your gauge and get adjustments needed

yarn_quantity_estimator.title: Yarn Quantity Estimator
yarn_quantity_estimator.description: Estimate the amount of yarn needed for your project based on gauge, yarn specifications, and project type
yarn_quantity_estimator.subtitle: Get a rough estimate of yarn requirements for planning your project

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This is a rough estimate and actual yarn usage may vary based on:
disclaimer.recommendation: Always purchase a little extra yarn to account for variations and potential mistakes.

ease_advisor.tool_description: Get personalized ease recommendations based on garment type, desired fit, and yarn weight to achieve your intended style and comfort.
ease_advisor.no_specific_measurements: No specific ease measurements required for this garment type.
ease_advisor.apply_suggestion_description: Use these recommended values in your ease preferences
ease_advisor.fallback_notice: General advice used - no specific rule found for this combination
